codeReview.summary: The close-emission regression is fixed, but the commit also changes visible copy in InitiateReviewPanel that is outside the requested scope and breaks existing form-binding expectations.

issues.description: This fix changes the selected-component summary text from `已选中 N 个 BRAN 管道构件` to `已选中 N 个构件`. That unrelated UX copy change is outside the close-emission regression scope and breaks the existing binding contract still asserted by `form-binding.test.ts`, so the feature no longer cleanly satisfies its narrowly scoped requirement without collateral behavior drift.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `designer-tracking-worker` skill still requires agent-browser manual verification for every feature, but this worker reasonably skipped it for a narrow emitted-event regression and validated through focused component tests instead.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/designer-tracking-worker/SKILL.md` step 6 requires agent-browser manual verification, while the handoff for `fix-form-binding-close-emission-regression` documents skipping browser automation because the fix was fully covered by Vitest event assertions.

summary: Reviewed the worker transcript, handoff, commit `9bf6a3ee86250d92ab4172e8ac5fcc7561224ff5`, and the current `InitiateReviewPanel`/`form-binding` sources. The close event regression itself is fixed, but the same commit also changes unrelated summary copy in `InitiateReviewPanel`, creating avoidable contract drift in a feature that was supposed to only restore close emission.
